# Every Layout (AI skill)

> Composable CSS layout primitives + axioms. Emit canonical, owned CSS (classes + custom
> properties) — never a dependency. Style the context, not the element; be the browser's
> mentor, not its micro-manager.

## Primitives
- Stack — vertical rhythm between flow siblings: references/primitives/stack.md
- Box — padded surface with safe inversion: references/primitives/box.md
- Center — centered, measure-capped column: references/primitives/center.md
- Cluster — wrapping group with even gaps: references/primitives/cluster.md
- Sidebar (.with-sidebar) — collapsing sidebar+content: references/primitives/with-sidebar.md
- Switcher — flip row↔column at a threshold: references/primitives/switcher.md
- Cover — min-height region, centered child: references/primitives/cover.md
- Grid — auto-fitting equal cells: references/primitives/grid.md
- Frame — aspect-ratio media crop: references/primitives/frame.md
- Reel — horizontal scroller: references/primitives/reel.md
- Imposter — element centered over another: references/primitives/imposter.md
- Icon — text-sized inline icon: references/primitives/icon.md

## Start here
- Pick a primitive by intent: references/decision-tree.md
- Axioms (measure, modular scale, units): references/rudiments.md
- Nesting rules: references/composition.md
- The owned stylesheet: every-layout.css
- Runnable layouts: examples/
